title: Hen Party Decoration Balloon Set 30Pcs, Hen Party Balloons, Rose Gold Bride to Be Balloons with Ribbons, Bride to Be Decorations, Hen Do Accessories for Hen Night Wedding Bridal Party
features: Bridal Shower Decoration Include: 10pcs 12inch rose gold "bride to be" balloons, 8pcs 12inch white "bride to be" balloons, 6pcs 12inch white balloons, 6pcs 12inch rose gold confetti balloons. We also provide ribbon to help you bulid a nice party for bride.

Hen Party Decoration: Just take pictures and share with your girls to make lasting memories! These rose gold ballons can not only provide good decorative effect, but also add a lively and happy feeling to the scene, making your bachelorette party full of joy and happiness.

Inflate with Air or Helium: Super cute! Easy to inflate and set up in like 15 minutes! You can fill it with air or helium. Latex balloons could last for a few days with air and 3-6 hours with helium.Just fill 80% of the balloons space that could allow the balloon to expand completely.

Multi Scene Use: Rose gold balloons are great to decorate for the bridal shower, bachelorette party, wedding, engagement, hen party, girls’ party and so on. If you desire to add more...ring foil balloons, champagne balloon, metallic fringe curtains, flowers etc, go for it! Your party background will be amazing and just take pictures to share with your friends together!

Warm Tips: Gently rub the confetti balloons on your hair to create static, which will make the confetti easier paste to the balloons’ inside surface.It is normal for latex products to have a slight odor, we recommend you place these balloons in a ventilated place for 1 to 2 days to dissipate. If you have any questions or needs about our products, please kindly feel free to contact us.
